---
title: "Charles Coleridge Pode"
---

## Charles Coleridge Pode

**Dates:** (1840-1873)

### Description

son of Thomas and Anne Pode

### Biography

subject of Keble’s poems ‘More Stars’ and ‘Wakefulness’, became a doctor, died young. [<i>John Keble’s Parishes</i>, 113;  <i>Alumni Oxonienses</i>]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
